title: ICJ Advisory Opinion on Israel’s obligations in the OPTs: UK position
body: "On 1 May 2025 the UK presented its position to the International Court of Justice for its Advisory Opinion on the ‘Obligations of Israel in relation to the Presence and Activities of the United Nations, Other International Organizations and Third States in and in relation to the Occupied Palestinian Territories’.   View the full ICJ records on this advisory opinion here: Obligations of Israel in relation to the Presence and Activities of the United Nations, Other International Organizations and Third States in and in relation to the Occupied Palestinian Territory  "

taxons.title: Peace and stability in the Middle East and North Africa
